notes:
- Added a real SecureLocker header update action that checks, downloads, and installs signed Tauri updates.
- Added a post-update changelog overlay that appears once after the app restarts on a newly installed version.
- Added a subtle in-app version label in the bottom-right corner so the running desktop build is always visible.
- Updater installs now rely on the configured Tauri public key and reject unsigned or invalid release artifacts.
- Kept update state separate from the authentication session flow so background update checks do not interfere with sign-in state.

bugFixes: Kept update state separate from the authentication session flow so background update checks do not interfere with sign-in state.
newFeatures: Added a real SecureLocker header update action that checks, downloads, and installs signed Tauri updates.
